title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Max Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Max Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
We at Max Healthcare are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Max Healthcare:
Max Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare!
